name: Almond-Topped Pear Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cornstarch, ginger, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add the corn syrup, melted butter, lemon juice, and lemon rind to the dry ingredients. Stir until smooth.
3. Add the pears and toss until well coated with the corn syrup mixture.
4. Arrange the pear mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Prepare the almond topping by combining the flour, brown sugar, and ginger in a bowl.
6. Cut in the butter using a pastry blender until crumbly.
7. Stir in the almonds.
8. Sprinkle the almond topping over the pears.
9. Bake in a preheated 400 degree F. oven for 15 minutes.
10. Reduce the heat to 350 degrees F. and bake an additional 30 minutes or until the topping and crust are golden brown.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
